name: golang-google-api-dev
title: golang-google-api-dev
description:
Google APIs Client Library
These are auto-generated Go libraries from the Google Discovery Service's JSON
description files of the available "new style" Google APIs.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-google-api-dev because Google APIs Client Library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-google-api-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-google-api-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-google-api-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
